7968.one_line_summary: Third-party authorized token transfers via signed owner approval.
7968.notes: Two-phase proposal/approval model with expiry and fallback recovery function for owner control.

7969.one_line_summary: DKIM public key hash registry for on-chain email ownership verification.
7969.notes: Enables email-based account abstraction via zkEmail; domain-specific key hashes stored on-chain.

7984.one_line_summary: Privacy-preserving fungible tokens using pointer-based confidential amounts.
7984.notes: Account-based model with pointer/commitment pattern for balance/transfer privacy; supports operator model and callbacks.

7985.one_line_summary: Standard attributes for cross-chain messaging gateways (cancellation, timeout, retry, dependencies).
7985.notes: Extends ERC-7786 with message lifecycle control; pluggable attributes for delivery timing/failure handling.

7988.one_line_summary: EIP-7702 delegate wallet with batched execution, policy modules, and fee sponsorship.
7988.notes: Immutable bytecode for all EOAs using 7702; supports policy/recovery module hooks; gas sponsorship via ETH or ERC-20.

7992.one_line_summary: Registry and verifier interfaces for ZK-proofs of ML model inferences on-chain.
7992.notes: Modular design: separate registry (model commitments) and verifier (proof validation); pluggable proof systems (Groth16, Plonk, STARKs).

7994.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension with multi-condition unlocking for controlled token disbursement.
7994.notes: Generalizes ERC-7291 with composable unlock conditions (time, KYC, whitelist, etc.); enables scholarships, aid, payroll use cases.

7996.one_line_summary: Feature detection method for contract capabilities lacking ERC-165 interface.
7996.notes: Complements ERC-165 with reverse-domain-named features and keccak256-derived 4-byte selectors; used by ENS.

8000.one_line_summary: Operator contract enabling batch calls for non-delegated EOAs via standard interface.
8000.notes: Alternative to 7702; uses transient storage for msg.sender context; compatible with ERC-2771 _msgSender pattern.

8001.one_line_summary: Multi-party agent coordination primitive using EIP-712 attestations and intents.
8001.notes: Single-chain intent + per-participant acceptances; canonical participant lists; lifecycle: Proposed → Ready → Executed; privacy/bonding/cross-chain as modules.

8002.one_line_summary: Trustless singleton SPV gateway for on-chain Bitcoin transaction verification via Merkle proofs.
8002.notes: Permissionless block header submission; PoW-based mainchain tracking; enables Bitcoin collateral in DeFi.

8004.one_line_summary: Trustless agent discovery and trust via identity, reputation, and validation registries.
8004.notes: ERC-721 agent identity registry with metadata; reputation scoring on-chain/off-chain; pluggable validation (stake, zkML, TEE).

8017.one_line_summary: Single-asset payout bucket dispensing entire balance for fixed payment (Dutch auction primitive).
8017.notes: Deterministic exchange: fills bucket of payout asset, winner pays fixed amount; analogous to Dutch auction; payment can be ETH or ERC-20.

8019.one_line_summary: Wallet-managed auto-login policy for SIWE message signing with domain/chain/resource matching.
8019.notes: Policy-based auto-signing for trusted SIWE domains; optional ERC-6492 support for hardware wallets via EIP-7702 session keys.

8023.one_line_summary: Multi-step contract ownership transfer with initiate, confirm, accept stages and time buffer.
8023.notes: 3-step transfer (original owner initiates/confirms, new owner accepts); optional time-gated buffer for review/rollback; compatible with ERC-173.
